document.title: Red Bull_Brand_Guidelines_2024 final.pdf
document.notes: Refs are included ONLY for graphical elements (e.g., assets, logo variants, image-based examples). All non-graph fields are collapsed to plain values/arrays.

brand_book_intro.definition: The Brand Book is an essential document that tells us who we are, what we offer, and why we matter and where we are going.
purpose_points: Tells a story about what we believe and offer, to help our consumers pursue their goals.
Serves as a guideline for all stakeholders in all markets to execute cohesive and effective brand assets across different channels and touchpoints.

strategy.vision: Give everyone the energy to live their purposes.
strategy.mission: Provide the range of effective and delicious energy drinks that caters to individuals of all lifestyles and preferences ensuring accessibility for everyone.
strategy.purpose: Enable people to pursue their goals with confidence, passion and determination (brand role: The Enabler).

brand_story.short_story: Red Bull is distinct because it represents a special combination of 'energy' and 'passion'—energizing people to do meaningful things and making the journey fulfilling.
brand_story.portfolio_overview: Three platforms: Core, Flavor, Functional (Product Portfolio).
proof_points: Long lasting efficacy enables you to work longer hours / do what you need to do (Core key message).
Specially formulated 'Concentration' improves focus and sustains energy for performance (Functional key message).
Most iconic, well-known, and trusted energy drink in the world.
Energy with Passion comes from providing efficacy through the right emotional connection with consumers.

positioning.positioning_statement: For everyone who needs energy to do meaningful things, Red Bull is the energy drink that helps them trust their inner strength and sustain what they do, powered by Energy with Passion.

target_audience.secondary: Platform-specific targets defined by Core / Flavor / Functional.
target_audience.bulls_eye_reference_note: For Bull’s Eyes of each product, please refer to the product portfolio.
target_audience.expanded_target_statement: Everyone who needs to do things that are meaningful to them.

supporting_points: Core key message emphasizes long lasting efficacy enabling you to work longer hours.
Campaign message example: 'Be Always On Top.'

value_propositions.claim: Everyday energy drink with pleasure (fruity flavors, carbonated refreshment).
supporting_points: Flavor key message: delicious fruity flavors refresh you while pursuing hobbies you're passionate about.
Campaign message example: 'Ignite All Your Passions.'
Functional key message: improves focus and sustains energy so you can level-up performance.

reasons_to_believe: Red Bull is trusted and well-known; differentiated by the special combination of energy + passion and emotional connection with consumers.

FUNCTIONAL.platform_role: Drive new occasions for energy drink
target_and_occasions: Functional benefits: immunity, hangover cure, focus & concentration
product_profile: ED signature taste is not always required

CORE.platform_role: Build base among heavy energy seekers

FLAVOR.platform_role: Reduce barriers & drive recruitment to ED category
product_profile: Smooth & easy to drink / with carbonation
ED signature taste is not always required

brand_role.name: THE ENABLER
brand_role.statement: We instill a sense of confidence and belief in people, helping them overcome obstacles and experience joy with passion and determination.

brand_footprint.definition: Brand Footprint is the summation of what the brand is about in a broader sense. It’s a one-word equity that people think of when they think of our brand.
brand_footprint.stability_rule: Brand Footprint remains unchanged for years, while Communication Idea can change after 1–2 years.

brand_footprint.label: Energy with Passion
brand_footprint.definition: Red Bull is passionate about energizing people and bring along the unique blend of energy and passion in everything we do.

communication_idea.label: Trust Your Energy
communication_idea.definition: Red Bull believes in the innate energy of everyone which will enable them to live their purposes.

brand_role.label: The Enabler
brand_role.definition: Red Bull products provide energy and inspiration bolstering the innate energy of everyone.

brand_target.statement: Everyone who needs to do things that are meaningful to them.

brand_system_comparison.title: The difference between TCP Red Bull and Red Bull Austria

tcp_red_bull.note: TCP Red Bull uses market-local logo variants and a broader local product portfolio.

red_bull_austria.note: Red Bull Austria reflects the classic global positioning and core can lineup.

tcp_red_bull_visual_world: Trust Your Energy as a lived attitude
red_bull_austria_visual_world: Iconic Red Bull brand worlds (e.g., space jump)

communication_platform.usage_rule: Serve as the big idea across all product platforms. It may not always take center stage (especially for new product launches communicating new benefits or ingredients), but it should always be present at least as the brand idea or slogan to drive consistency.
communication_platform.context_note: Next pages show examples of how each product platform can work under 'Trust Your Energy'.

CORE.intent: Express confidence and readiness to perform under the 'Trust Your Energy' idea.

FLAVORS.intent: Connect flavors to passion-driven, fun, expressive moments under the 'Trust Your Energy' idea.

FUNCTIONAL.intent: Lead with functional benefit and performance uplift while staying anchored to 'Trust Your Energy'.

what_we_are: Lively, energetic, always looking for growth and improvement.
Motivated and focused on progress and everyday experience.
Supports people pursuing strong desires and meaningful goals.
Believes in the positive state of going after what you want; energy makes it possible.

traits_with_definitions.definition: Red Bull is lively, energetic and always looking for growth and improvement.
Red Bull is extremely motivated and focused on progress and everyday experience.
Red Bull gives energy to the strong desires that people have when they pursue something out of life, no matter big or small.
Red Bull believes that going after what you want is the positive state to be in. Even though the journey is not easy, if you have the energy to do it, that is the FEEL-GOOD moment.

dos: Encourage people to believe in their inner strength and energy.
Connect energy to passion, determination, and meaningful pursuits.
donts: Avoid artificial-looking imagery; emphasize authenticity in skin texture, lighting, and expressions.

supporting_points: Brand footprint stays for years; communication ideas can change after 1–2 years.
Red Bull is different because it is the most iconic, well-known, and trusted energy drink in the world.
Energy with Passion reflects the special combination of 'energy' and 'passion'.
proof_points: Used to guide design, photography, storytelling, touchpoints, influencers, events, product developments.
For individuals, having the energy to do something and the passion to do it meaningfully can be extremely fulfilling.
For the brand, Energy with Passion comes from providing efficacy through the right emotional connection with consumers.

supporting_points: Encourages people to believe in their inner strength and energy, whatever they do.
Applies across product platforms (Core, Flavors, Functional) and should remain as brand idea/slogan.

approved.usage: Always present as brand idea/slogan across platforms; can sit behind campaign messages.
Market usage shown under TCP Red Bull slogans list.

deprecated.note: Shown as Red Bull Austria slogan (not TCP Red Bull positioning in this guideline).

approved_claims: Long lasting efficacy enables you to work longer hours.
Delicious fruity flavors refresh you while pursuing passions/hobbies.
Improves focus and sustains energy for performance (Concentration).

on_situ_materials.note: These pages illustrate how the brand system is applied in real environments (OOH placements and digital/device contexts).

promotional_items.scope_note: Red Bull logo can be used in various promotional items across media and object sizes (small to large), for decorating event stands or small promotions. Cropping/rotation is only allowed in specific cases.

two_red_bulls_usage.rule_summary: Be respectful to all elements of the logo. Separation, recomposition, or alteration are not allowed. The typography 'RED BULL' cannot be mixed with other typography.

one_red_bull_usage.allowed_construction: Use a single left bull with the sun as a graphic element.
constraints: Rotation and cropping are allowed, but always keep the front legs visible.
Never change the sun and the bull proportion.
placement_guidance: Bull should be positioned upward or forward.
Use a suitable size with a croppable area.
Always have the Red Bull mark visible in the immediate area.
donts: Do not crop so much that front legs are not clearly visible.
Do not position the bull in a downward motion.
Do not use the bull without the sun.

mugs_and_bottles.background_rule: Red Bull logo is not allowed to appear on photographic background; it is only allowed on natural textures of materials (e.g., ceramic, glass, steel).

fashion_items.two_sides_rule: The Red Bull should be clearly placed on both sides with near-identical sizes.
fashion_items.cropping_rule: The 'Red Bull' can be cropped; however it should cover the front legs.
fashion_items.size_balance_rule: Do not crop one side to be significantly smaller than the other.
fashion_items.pairing_rule: The bulls are always used together with the sun.
fashion_items.flexible_usage_note: Logo usage can be more flexible with fashion items and can be combined with cool lines / meaningful sentences.

style_guidance: Prefer cotton, clean material, good fabric quality.
Keep clothing simple and modern; place Red Bull logo at a bold position.
placement_restrictions: Do NOT place the logo on trousers, skirts, socks, or any lower part of the attire.
donts: Outfit should not be too exposed.
Do not look cheap.
Do not mislead the character of the brand.

collaborations.rule_summary: Do not use inappropriate Red Bull logo usage. For collaborations, use a graphic element that plays between the Red Bull logo and the partner’s logo/name, using a 'Red Bull X' construction.
x_placement_options: X placed to the right of the Red Bull logo
X placed underneath the Red Bull logo

owned_projects.rule_summary: For Red Bull’s own projects/events/activations, a composite logo can be created but the integrity/structure of the Red Bull logo must not be modified.

regulations.clear_space_rule: Minimum clear space around the Red Bull logo must be at least 1/8 height of the sun.
regulations.campaign_name_height_rule: Total height of the campaign name must not exceed 4× the height of the Red Bull sun.

usage_rules: Be respectful to all elements of the logo.
Separation, recomposition, or alteration are not allowed.
The typography 'RED BULL' cannot be mixed with other typography.

when_to_use: Special printing/production that does not support ordinary colored files
Narrow placements where a standard logo is not practical

rules: Slogan differs from Red Bull Austria (TCP: Trust Your Energy / You Are The Real Bull (China); Austria: Gives You Wings).
Brand footprint differs (TCP: Energy with passion; Austria: Extreme sports).

brand_template.basic_principle: Use the Red Bull Sun as the unit of measurement to proportion and balance layout elements across templates.
brand_template.master_rule: Place the logo at the right size first, then use the Red Bull Sun as the measurement unit to proportion all elements.

headline_and_tagline_font.notes: Acumin is the headline & tagline font.

localization_support.note: Guideline includes examples of localized typography usage (e.g., Khmer and Hindi executions).

donts: TBD

iconography.principle: For icons, use Red Bull’s Sun as the main graphic element; it is flexible and can be played with in different configurations.

key_elements.name: OFFICIAL_ELEMENT_PACKS
key_elements.description: Guideline references official Flash/KV/Ad element packs via links; treat as source of truth for graphic elements.
usage_rules: Use official element packs linked in the guideline.

donts: TBD
TBD

graphic_elements.flash_usage_rule: When the pack is in the visual, the flash should only support the tagline (not compete with the pack).

purpose: Add a dynamic footprint to materials
flash.definition: A flash of colored light that can change depending on the different products.
flash.placement_behavior: Passes behind the pack to emphasize it and give a sense of spirited energy.

black_space_rule.rule: Black space can be used for the visual, but a full black background is not allowed for all product shots.

clear_space.rule_summary: Keep clear space around the logo using the Red Bull sun circle as the unit (see clear-space diagrams).

colorways.notes: Monochrome/inverse usage is allowed for special production constraints.

donts: Do not recolor outside approved colorways.
Do not stretch, squash, or distort.
Do not rotate or tilt.
Do not add shadows, outlines, glows, or effects.
Do not rearrange elements or change proportions.
Do not place on low-contrast or busy backgrounds that hurt legibility.
Do not remove elements or substitute typography.

photography.ai_generated_visuals_note: Because sourcing images that fully match the desired attitude without on-site shooting is challenging, some visuals in this guideline are AI-generated to align with the desired attitude and occasions. The goal is NOT artificial-looking imagery; for real shoots, emphasize authentic skin texture, lighting, and expressions.
photography.image_must_embody: Every image used should embody dynamism, determination, purpose, and positivity.

style.mood: Dynamic, determined, purposeful, positive; authentic and realistic.
style.lighting: Natural lighting emphasis; realistic situations conveyed via lighting and composition.

donts: Black background is not allowed for product shots (the black space is for the visual, not as a product-shot background).

water_splashes_and_ice.rule: Do not use water splashes and ice simultaneously in the same composition.
water_splashes_and_ice.rationale: They symbolize different stages of melting; the layout should represent freshness and energy of Red Bull.
guidance: To convey energy and dynamism, use splashes.
To convey determination and power, use ice.
water_splashes_and_ice.exception: It is possible to use splash of product from the bottle/can together with ice.

allowed: Other real-world elements to enhance the pack

camera_angle.not_allowed: Do not shoot the pack from an above angle.
do: Or shoot slightly from a lower angle
camera_angle.note: Ensure not to exceed the limit to avoid showing too much of the bottle bottom.

lifestyle_composition.rule: Never tilt the packs in a composition with a lifestyle visual where the product is placed like a pack shot.
lifestyle_composition.do: Portray only straight packs with the flash.

still_life_only_packs.rule: In still life compositions where only the packs are the visual, packs may be moved/tilted.

dos: Shoot the pack from the front view or slightly at a lower angle.
donts: Don’t shoot the pack from an above angle (avoid making it look powerless).
Don’t exceed the angle limit to avoid showing too much of the bottle bottom.

allowed: Keep real texture of skin with small imperfections; keep real hair with flyaways; keep realistic situations via natural lighting/composition.
not_allowed: Avoid artificial-looking imagery; if AI-generated visuals are used, they should align with desired attitude/occasions but not look artificial.

core: Core pack shot KV with water splashes
Core pack shot KV with ice
KV with multiple packs and ice
flavor: Flavor pack shot KV examples (multiple variants)

family_flavor_packshot.rule: Use the specific background grouping that regroups all flavor colors in one proportion; the background can be rotated depending on which flavor is highlighted.

liquid_visual_identity.importance_note: The liquid must be as close to reality as possible. Color must respect real product color. Textures, bubbles, splashes, and related elements can be used to convey energy, determination, and action.
liquid_visual_identity.splash_style: Liquid splashes must be dynamic and bold.
liquid_visual_identity.creative_intent: Create appetizing product still life to celebrate Red Bull product values and attract people to try and drink it.

mood_principles: Use portrait or wider-format pictures showing clear facial expressions.
Subject should be on the move, as if capturing the first second of action.
Background should be slightly blur or motion blur to convey movement and a dynamic mood and tone.

storytelling_principles.core: Tell real stories in real life to connect with consumers in a modern and inspiring way.

talent_direction.rule: Show emotion. In all situations (moving or still), direct talent to express feelings and deliver Red Bull brand values.

reference_examples.label: Real photo examples for portraying talents (authentic texture/hair/lighting/composition).

donts: TBD

dos: Portray talent as real people with personalities
Portray celebrities as another human being (with flaws and struggles)
Focus on attitude of individuals in the story
Focus on the benefits of Red Bull
Minimal use of copy and supers
donts: Stereotype or over-dramatization of the story
Using talents as good-looking models only
Portray celebrities as superstars (always successful and too-good-to-be-true)
Focus on careers and adventures of individuals
Focus on the problem
Lack of memorable scenes
Too much voice over & supers
Static and still energy
Cliché music like EDM for every piece of content

music_guideline.role_of_music: Music is a vital part of communication; it sets the right mood and tone of all assets.
music_guideline.brand_personality_support: Power of music should enhance Red Bull brand personality: dynamic, determined, purposeful, and feel-good.
mixing_rules: Music should lead to a clear message.
Music should not compete with voice over (instrumental is recommended).
Music with vocal can be used in parts with no voice over.

cgi_with_bumping_bulls.storytelling_effects_rule: Do not add special effects into the storytelling; it will create fake perceptions. Red Bull doesn’t give superpowers.
cgi_with_bumping_bulls.cgi_demo_allowed: CGI can be used for demo purposes.

bumping_bull_end_scene.rule: Use the recommended 'bumping bull graphic end scene' version to sign off all films for consistency.
bumping_bull_end_scene.new_version_process: If a new version is needed, reach out to the global marketing team for alignment.

donts: Don't mix the bumping bull graphic with the pack.
Don't write 'RED BULL' with other fonts.
Don't use the logo other than its form.
TBD

key_visual_system.structure: KV/Ad/Flash elements exist as downloadable packs referenced in the guideline.
key_visual_system.flash_with_packshot_rule: When the pack is in the visual, the Flash should only support the tagline.
dos: Use official KV/Ad/Flash element packs from the guideline links.
donts: TBD
TBD
TBD
TBD
TBD

overrides: TCP messaging emphasizes Trust Your Energy and Energy with Passion rather than extreme sports positioning.

how_we_differ: TCP: Energy with passion; Trust Your Energy; personality: dynamic/determined/purposeful/feel-good.

global_brand_vision_2024_2026.three_year_vision: To be an unbeatable leader in Energy Drink in Asia who energizes different groups of consumer anywhere anytime with superior value propositions.
mission: Build Red Bull as a cool, younger and meaningful brand to all consumer groups.
Offer ED products with the right balance of functional and emotional benefit, with Global Portfolio Architecture yet addressing local needs.
